top_signals.title: By the Numbers: Maritime Safety in 2026 — Fewer Losses, Bigger Risks
top_signals.summary: The maritime industry continues to improve its safety record, but the challenges confronting shipowners, operators, insurers and regulators have never been more complex.According to Allianz Commercial's Safety and Shipping Review 2026, global shipping losses remain near historic lows…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: South Korea stock volatility hits record high amid AI doubts
top_signals.summary: Shares of chipmakers Samsung and SK Hynix gyrate in choppy trading
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hedge Funds Are Set to Win More Exemptions From EU ESG Rules
top_signals.summary: Hedge funds are set to be excluded from a requirement that would force investment managers in Europe to categorize whether their products are ESG or not.

top_signals.title: Aave could soar to $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival, says StanChart
Commission pays €846 million to Spain to support recovery following the 2024 Valencia region floods
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 24 Jun 2026 The European Commission has approved the payment of €846 million to Spain from the EU Solidarity Fund (EUSF) to support the reconstruction efforts after the devastating floods that struck the Valencia Region in October 2024.

top_signals.title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
top_signals.summary: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.
